enrichments.rule: AVANT de supprimer un fichier, toujours run gitnexus_context pour lister tous les importers. Traiter chaque importer avant de supprimer.
AVANT de modifier la signature d'une fonction exportee, run gitnexus_impact upstream pour identifier tous les callers. Mettre a jour chaque caller dans ton scope.
Utiliser les path aliases (@src/, @modules/, @shared/ pour backend, @/ pour frontend) pour tous les imports. Jamais de chemins relatifs profonds (../../..).
Quand tu crees un nouveau fichier qui exporte des symboles, verifier que le barrel index.ts parent re-exporte si necessaire. Ne pas creer d'exports orphelins.

Apres avoir fini tes modifications, relire la liste complete des imports de chaque fichier modifie. Supprimer les imports inutilises. Verifier que chaque import pointe vers un fichier/symbole existant.

enrichment.score: number 0-5, average over last 3 evaluated runs
enrichment.runs_evaluated: number — how many runs this PE was evaluated in

_scoring.5: PE directly prevented an error that occurred in a previous run
_scoring.4: PE was followed and contributed to clean output
_scoring.3: PE was followed but had no measurable impact
_scoring.2: PE was partially followed or unclear
_scoring.1: PE was ignored by the agent
_scoring.0: PE was counterproductive or caused confusion

_lifecycle.reformulated PE: resets runs_evaluated to 0, keeps id with suffix -R1, -R2
